ddls:
CREATE TABLE "policies" (
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each policy */,
  "policy_path" TEXT /* Path to the policy setting */,
  "policy_setting_name" TEXT /* Name of the policy setting */,
  "mdm_area" TEXT /* MDM area of the policy (e.g., Settings, Personalization) */,
  "mdm_policy" TEXT /* MDM policy name */,
  "ms_baseline" TEXT /* MS baseline for the policy */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment or description of the policy */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the policy was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the policy was last updated */,
  "policy_category" TEXT /* Category of the policy */,
  "policy_sub_category" TEXT /* Sub-category of the policy */,
  "policy_version" TEXT /* Version of the policy */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("policy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "registry_info" (
  "registry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each registry entry */,
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the policy associated with the registry entry */,
  "registry_key" TEXT /* Registry key for the policy */,
  "registry_value" TEXT /* Registry value for the policy */,
  "registry_type" TEXT /* Type of registry value (e.g., string, integer, boolean) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("registry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_registry_info_policy_id FOREIGN KEY ("policy_id") REFERENCES policies ("policy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "supported_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supported version */,
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the policy associated with the supported version */,
  "windows_version" TEXT /* Supported Windows version (e.g., Windows 10, Windows Server 2012) */,
  "min_build_number" INTEGER /* Minimum build number required for the policy */,
  "max_build_number" INTEGER /* Maximum build number supported by the policy */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_supported_versions_policy_id FOREIGN KEY ("policy_id") REFERENCES policies ("policy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "help_text" (
  "help_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each help text entry */,
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the policy associated with the help text */,
  "help_text" TEXT /* Help text for the policy */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language of the help text (e.g., English, Spanish, French) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("help_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_help_text_policy_id FOREIGN KEY ("policy_id") REFERENCES policies ("policy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "policy_areas" (
  "area_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each policy area */,
  "area_name" TEXT /* Name of the policy area */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the policy area */,
  "parent_area_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent policy area (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("area_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_policy_areas_parent_area_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_area_id") REFERENCES policy_areas ("area_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mdm_policies" (
  "mdm_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each MDM policy */,
  "mdm_name" TEXT /* Name of the MDM policy */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the MDM policy */,
  "mdm_area_id" INTEGER /* ID of the policy area associated with the MDM policy */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mdm_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mdm_policies_mdm_area_id FOREIGN KEY ("mdm_area_id") REFERENCES policy_areas ("area_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ms_baselines" (
  "baseline_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each MS baseline */,
  "baseline_name" TEXT /* Name of the MS baseline */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the MS baseline */,
  "baseline_version" TEXT /* Version of the MS baseline */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("baseline_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, IT staff, end-user) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "policy_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each policy assignment */,
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the policy being assigned */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user being assigned the policy */,
  "group_id" INTEGER /* ID of the group being assigned the policy */,
  "assignment_date" TEXT /* Date the policy was assigned */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_policy_assignments_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("group_id") REFERENCES groups ("group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_policy_assignments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_policy_assignments_policy_id FOREIGN KEY ("policy_id") REFERENCES policies ("policy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "groups" (
  "group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each group */,
  "group_name" TEXT /* Name of the group */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the group */,
  "parent_group_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent group (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_groups_parent_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_group_id") REFERENCES groups ("group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log entry */,
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the policy being changed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the change */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date of the change */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., create, update, delete) */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_policy_id FOREIGN KEY ("policy_id") REFERENCES policies ("policy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "policy_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each policy version */,
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the policy associated with the version */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the policy */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the policy version */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the policy version was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_policy_versions_policy_id FOREIGN KEY ("policy_id") REFERENCES policies ("policy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "policy_dependencies" (
  "dependency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each policy dependency */,
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the policy that has a dependency */,
  "dependent_policy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the policy that is depended on */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dependency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_policy_dependencies_dependent_policy_id FOREIGN KEY ("dependent_policy_id") REFERENCES policies ("policy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_policy_dependencies_policy_id FOREIGN KEY ("policy_id") REFERENCES policies ("policy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "policy_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each policy tag */,
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the policy associated with the tag */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_policy_tags_policy_id FOREIGN KEY ("policy_id") REFERENCES policies ("policy_id")
)
